pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property from Java 8 to Java 11 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 language features, which may fail if Java 11-specific APIs are used or if the build environment enforces strict source/target alignment with the runtime JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property from Java 8 to Java 11 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the generated bytecode targets Java 8, which may cause runtime errors or incompatibilities when running on a Java 11 JVM that expects newer bytecode versions or specific module system behaviors.
